attributes.title: [InfluxDB OTel] HTTP & Storage
attributes.description: HTTP API traffic, write/query throughput, storage health (WAL, cache, compaction), and writer metrics.

This dashboard focuses on the write path and storage:
- HTTP API requests by endpoint and status
- Write and query throughput (bytes, counts)
- WAL, cache, and TSM disk usage
- Compaction queue and duration
- Storage writer (points written, dropped, errors)
